name: tribastion-quiz-platform
description: Tribastion — real-time enterprise quiz platform (MERN + TypeScript)

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=apps/server & npm run dev --workspace=apps/client
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/server && npm run build --workspace=apps/client
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=apps/server && npm run test --workspace=apps/client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/server && npm run lint --workspace=apps/client
